howItWorks.intro: This data privacy compliance cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Initial Cost
rules.formula: Cost = Base x Size Multiplier x Data Volume Multiplier x State Multiplier
rules.explanation: The base compliance cost scaled by company size, data volume, and how much work remains.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much does GDPR compliance cost for a small business?
faq.a: Small businesses (under 50 employees) typically spend $15,000-$50,000 on initial compliance, with $5,000-$15,000 in annual maintenance.

faq.q: Do I need a Data Protection Officer?
faq.a: Under GDPR, a DPO is mandatory for organizations processing large-scale personal data or public authorities. Under CCPA, there is no DPO requirement but a privacy lead is recommended.

howWeCalculate.intro: This data privacy compliance cost calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
